\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/blinky/processes/p_state_reg:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_state\_reg: Clocked state register.
Captures next\_state on each rising edge of clk.
Synchronous reset drives state back to OFF\_STATE.

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-c4e90d5c-835e-4a26-bde1-84530f3ac3cc}.pdf}


\subparagraph{Source}
\label{\detokenize{modules/blinky/processes/p_state_reg:source}}

\PYG{k}{begin}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{rising\PYGZus{}edge}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{clk}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{then}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{rst}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+sc}{\PYGZsq{}1\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{then}
\PYG{+w}{            }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{OFF\PYGZus{}STATE}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{else}
\PYG{+w}{            }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{process}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nc}{p\PYGZus{}state\PYGZus{}reg}\PYG{p}{;}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\paragraph{p\_next\_state}

\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/blinky/processes/p_next_state:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_next\_state: Combinational next\sphinxhyphen{}state logic.
FSM only advances when both en and timer\_exp are asserted.
If en is deasserted the state holds regardless of timer\_exp.
Transitions:
.. code\sphinxhyphen{}block:: none
\begin{quote}

\sphinxAtStartPar
OFF\_STATE  + en + timer\_exp \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} ON\_STATE
ON\_STATE   + en + timer\_exp \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} FADE\_STATE
FADE\_STATE + en + timer\_exp \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} OFF\_STATE
\end{quote}

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-c746ec44-9c19-402f-966a-673a3c38b597}.pdf}

\label{\detokenize{modules/blinky/processes/p_next_state:source}}

\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/blinky/processes/p_outputs:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_outputs: Combinational Moore output decode.
Drives LED outputs based solely on current state.
All outputs default to 0 before the case statement to
prevent latches during synthesis.
Output truth table:
.. code\sphinxhyphen{}block:: none
\begin{quote}

\sphinxAtStartPar
OFF\_STATE  \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} led\_on=0 led\_fade=0 led\_off=1
ON\_STATE   \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} led\_on=1 led\_fade=0 led\_off=0
FADE\_STATE \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} led\_on=0 led\_fade=1 led\_off=0
\end{quote}

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-7fb4661f-397d-4b1a-a7a9-33a482b6aa72}.pdf}

\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/cfg_sync/processes/p_cfg_reg:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_cfg\_reg: Register config inputs in the cfg\_clk domain.
Provides a stable registered version of mode\_sel and duty\_cycle
before they cross into the sys\_clk domain.

\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/cfg_sync/processes/p_mode_sync:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_mode\_sync: Two\sphinxhyphen{}flop synchroniser for mode\_sel\_r (cfg\_clk \(\rightarrow\) sys\_clk).
mode\_sel\_r is sampled twice in the sys\_clk domain to resolve
metastability before the signal is used by downstream logic.

\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/cfg_sync/processes/p_duty_capture:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_duty\_capture: Capture duty\_cycle\_r directly in the sys\_clk domain.
WARNING: This is an unsynchronised multi\sphinxhyphen{}bit crossing. duty\_cycle\_r is
driven in the cfg\_clk domain and sampled here without a handshake or
grey\sphinxhyphen{}code scheme. Glitches are possible if both bits change together
near a sys\_clk edge. A proper implementation should use a handshake
protocol or an async FIFO.

\paragraph{p\_state\_reg}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_state_reg:p-state-reg}}\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_state_reg::doc}}
\begin{DUlineblock}{0em}
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Source file:} \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{pwm\_controller.sv}}
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Source line:} 53
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Block type:} \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{always\_ff}}
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Sensitivity list:} \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{posedge clk}}
\end{DUlineblock}


\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_state_reg:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_state\_reg: Clocked state and counter register.
Captures next\_state on each rising edge of clk.
Synchronous reset drives state to IDLE and clears counter.
Counter increments each cycle in COUNTING state.

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-74c53d3c-89cb-47d3-b3e3-c4efc0ece4ad}.pdf}


\subparagraph{Source}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_state_reg:source}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k}{always\PYGZus{}ff}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{@}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{k}{posedge}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{clk}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{begin}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{p\PYGZus{}state\PYGZus{}reg}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{rst}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{begin}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{IDLE}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{n}{count}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+m}{\PYGZsq{}0}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{else}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{begin}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{COUNTING}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{+w}{            }\PYG{n}{count}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{count}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{+}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+m+mb}{1\PYGZsq{}b1}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{else}
\PYG{+w}{            }\PYG{n}{count}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+m}{\PYGZsq{}0}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{end}

\paragraph{p\_next\_state}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_next_state:p-next-state}}\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_next_state::doc}}
\begin{DUlineblock}{0em}
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Source file:} \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{pwm\_controller.sv}}
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Source line:} 85
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Block type:} \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{always\_comb}}
\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Sensitivity list:} \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{*}}
\end{DUlineblock}


\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_next_state:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_next\_state: Combinational next\sphinxhyphen{}state logic.
FSM advances only when en is asserted.
COUNTING state runs for a full 256\sphinxhyphen{}cycle period then moves to DONE.
Transitions:
.. code\sphinxhyphen{}block:: none
\begin{quote}

\sphinxAtStartPar
IDLE     + en           \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} COUNTING
COUNTING + count==255   \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} DONE
DONE                    \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} IDLE
\end{quote}

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-11304b62-0d3c-44ba-a27b-1e02e586f181}.pdf}


\subparagraph{Source}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_next_state:source}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k}{always\PYGZus{}comb}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{begin}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{p\PYGZus{}next\PYGZus{}state}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{case}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{n+nl}{IDLE:}\PYG{+w}{     }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{en}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{+w}{              }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{COUNTING}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{n+nl}{COUNTING:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{count}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+m+mh}{8\PYGZsq{}hFF}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{+w}{  }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{DONE}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{n+nl}{DONE:}\PYG{+w}{                          }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{IDLE}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{default}\PYG{o}{:}\PYG{+w}{                       }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{IDLE}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{endcase}
\PYG{k}{end}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\paragraph{p\_outputs}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_outputs:p-outputs}}\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_outputs::doc}}
\begin{DUlineblock}{0em}

\end{DUlineblock}


\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_outputs:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_outputs: Combinational Moore output decode.
PWM output is high when counter is below duty\_i threshold.
period\_done pulses for exactly one cycle when state is DONE.
Output truth table:
.. code\sphinxhyphen{}block:: none
\begin{quote}

\sphinxAtStartPar
IDLE     \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} pwm\_o=0 period\_done=0
COUNTING \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} pwm\_o=(count \textless{} duty\_i) period\_done=0
DONE     \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} pwm\_o=0 period\_done=1
\end{quote}

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-8687483b-2da2-402e-8486-0e02fbcf628f}.pdf}


\subparagraph{Source}
\label{\detokenize{modules/pwm_controller/processes/p_outputs:source}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k}{always\PYGZus{}comb}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{begin}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{p\PYGZus{}outputs}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n}{pwm\PYGZus{}o}\PYG{+w}{       }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+m+mb}{1\PYGZsq{}b0}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n}{period\PYGZus{}done}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+m+mb}{1\PYGZsq{}b0}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{case}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{n+nl}{IDLE:}\PYG{+w}{     }\PYG{k}{begin}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{pwm\PYGZus{}o}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+m+mb}{1\PYGZsq{}b0}\PYG{p}{;}\PYG{+w}{           }\PYG{n}{period\PYGZus{}done}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+m+mb}{1\PYGZsq{}b0}\PYG{p}{;}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{end}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{n+nl}{COUNTING:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{begin}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{pwm\PYGZus{}o}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{count}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{duty\PYGZus{}i}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{;}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{period\PYGZus{}done}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+m+mb}{1\PYGZsq{}b0}\PYG{p}{;}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{end}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Traffic light controller.

\sphinxAtStartPar
Implements a standard UK traffic light sequencer with four states:
RED, RED\_AMBER, GREEN, and AMBER. The FSM advances on each rising
clock edge when timer\_exp is asserted.

\sphinxAtStartPar
State sequence: RED \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} RED\_AMBER \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} GREEN \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} AMBER \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} RED.

\paragraph{p\_state\_reg}
\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_state_reg:p-state-reg}}\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_state_reg::doc}}
\begin{DUlineblock}{0em}

\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Source line:} 65

\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Sensitivity list:} \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{clk}}
\end{DUlineblock}


\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_state_reg:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_state\_reg: Clocked state register.
Captures next\_state on each rising edge of clk.
When rst is asserted the state returns to RED synchronously,
regardless of timer\_exp or next\_state.

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-92877f8b-efad-4420-a7d7-4c95f6f78dd7}.pdf}


\subparagraph{Source}
\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_state_reg:source}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n}{p\PYGZus{}state\PYGZus{}reg}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{:}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{process}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{clk}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{k}{begin}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{rising\PYGZus{}edge}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{clk}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{then}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{rst}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+sc}{\PYGZsq{}1\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{then}
\PYG{+w}{            }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{RED}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{else}
\PYG{+w}{            }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{next\PYGZus{}state}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{if}\PYG{p}{;}
\PYG{k}{end}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{process}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n+nc}{p\PYGZus{}state\PYGZus{}reg}\PYG{p}{;}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\paragraph{p\_next\_state}
\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_next_state:p-next-state}}\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_next_state::doc}}
\begin{DUlineblock}{0em}

\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Source line:} 99

\item[] \sphinxstylestrong{Sensitivity list:} \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{state}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{timer\_exp}}
\end{DUlineblock}


\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_next_state:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_next\_state: Combinational next\sphinxhyphen{}state logic.
Evaluates the FSM transition function. Default assignment
next\_state \textless{}= state implements hold when timer\_exp is low.
All four transitions are guarded solely by timer\_exp = 1.
Transitions:
.. code\sphinxhyphen{}block:: none
\begin{quote}

\sphinxAtStartPar
RED       + timer\_exp \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} RED\_AMBER
RED\_AMBER + timer\_exp \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} GREEN
GREEN     + timer\_exp \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} AMBER
AMBER     + timer\_exp \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} RED
\end{quote}

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-7b15d2a2-1774-4de9-be28-584167715256}.pdf}

\subparagraph{Description}
\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_outputs:description}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
p\_outputs: Combinational Moore output decode.
Drives lamp outputs based solely on current state.
All outputs default to 0 before the case statement to
prevent latches during synthesis.
Output truth table:
.. code\sphinxhyphen{}block:: none
\begin{quote}

\sphinxAtStartPar
RED       \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} red=1 amber=0 green=0
RED\_AMBER \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} red=1 amber=1 green=0
GREEN     \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} red=0 amber=0 green=1
AMBER     \sphinxhyphen{}\textgreater{} red=0 amber=1 green=0
\end{quote}

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics{{wavedrom-123542da-df1c-49bc-8243-0261714f722c}.pdf}

\label{\detokenize{modules/traffic_light/processes/p_outputs:source}}

\PYG{k}{begin}
\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{n}{red\PYGZus{}out}\PYG{+w}{   }\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{l+s+sc}{\PYGZsq{}0\PYGZsq{}}\PYG{p}{;}

\PYG{+w}{    }\PYG{k}{case}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{n}{state}\PYG{+w}{ }\PYG{k}{is}
\PYG{+w}{        }\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZhy{}\PYGZhy{} define red}
